description: Evidence audit for deterministic real-paper CellForge hypotheses.

unsupported_claims: All cited real-paper claims are extraction artifacts requiring human validation.
Hypothesis uses directional performance language that must remain proposal-level until experimentally validated.
contradiction_notes: real:C123_01 (real:P123): Low discharge capacity (125 mAh/g) and contamination from electrode sputtering

unsupported_claims: All cited real-paper claims are extraction artifacts requiring human validation.
contradiction_notes: real:C081_01 (real:P081): The efficacy is heavily dependent on the biopolymer precursor chemistry, as starch-derived carbons did not exhibit comparable kinetic improvements.

unsupported_claims: All cited real-paper claims are extraction artifacts requiring human validation.
Hypothesis uses directional performance language that must remain proposal-level until experimentally validated.
contradiction_notes: real:C110_01 (real:P110): The processing required chloroform (CHCl3) solvent, and the polymer has lower adhesion to copper than PVDF.

unsupported_claims: All cited real-paper claims are extraction artifacts requiring human validation.
Hypothesis uses directional performance language that must remain proposal-level until experimentally validated.
contradiction_notes: real:C044_01 (real:P044): The processing current was limited to 3-4 mA, and the setup operates under vacuum conditions.

unsupported_claims: All cited real-paper claims are extraction artifacts requiring human validation.
Hypothesis uses directional performance language that must remain proposal-level until experimentally validated.
contradiction_notes: real:C075_01 (real:P075): High tortuosity still limits performance at high discharge rates.
